maledictus.title: Locate and defeat Maledictus (Cataclysm — unlocks after Ancient Remnant kill)

subtitle.text: The Cataclysm chain has a direction. Maledictus is the second step.

description: Maledictus becomes available after the Ancient Remnant is dead.
It drops Cursium — a critical material for the Cataclysm equipment chain.
Cursium enables the Annihilator and Ignis bosses.
Those enable the Emulator — the final Cataclysm boss.
The Magical Eye requires Cataclysm boss drops:
The chain must be completed to craft the Magical Eye.
The Netherite Monstrosity also drops lacrima —
the trigger item for the Infernal chapter (Ch11).
The Cataclysm chain unlocks the next chapter AND an eye.
